name: Synup Social vs. Agorapulse
hero_summary: Lovers of Agorapulse will love Synup Social. Loved by analytics and community management fans, Agorapulse is renowned for its tracking and data capabilities. Brands that appreciate this data-driven approach should upgrade to Synup Social. With advanced data analytics by platform and post, Synup Social empowers users to see what content is driving their day-to-day success. And with expanded capabilities to create data-informed posts based on trends or past performance, Synup Social is the clear choice for businesses looking to up their social media game.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: Synup Social empowers you to do more with less. Agorapulse’s interface has a steep learning curve, providing valuable insights only if you take the time to learn it. Synup Social has an intuitive platform with the same robust analytics - and more. Although Agorapulse is well-loved by large brands and small businesses alike, Synup Social stands out because of its:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Your social media needs to be data-driven - and that means having the right tool. Agorapulse’s analytics lack the post-by-post analysis that lets you see what drives day-to-day engagement. With Synup Social, you can see which posts are driving engagement over time with interactive engagement graphs and easily track and monitor your brand’s performance over time, giving you a clear picture of your ROI. Get ready to grow!
section_2_slider_2_heading: Unique post ideas & AI-powered content creation
section_2_slider_2_summary: Say goodbye to writer’s block! Synup Social helps you revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more. While Agorapulse provides no content creation support, Synup inspires your top-performing posts. Take the hassle out of social media management with competitor tracking, trend forecasting, post analytics, and more, and get ready to smash your engagement goals!
section_2_step_3_summary: Time to collaborate! Align your team and synchronize your efforts with your team or your clients - at no extra cost. While Agorapulse’s bare-bones approval workflow makes it difficult to collaborate with your team without an offline discussion, Synup Social empowers you to manage your content cohesively. Team members can collaborate on posts together, submitting posts to supervisors and clients so they can approve posts and provide feedback. Easy peasy!
section_2_slider_4_summary: Agorapulse’s basic support for multi-location businesses doesn’t cut it: cross-posting across locations isn’t possible, turning a single post into a huge chore. With Synup Social, you can schedule multi-location and multi-brand posts simultaneously! Synup Social makes it simple for brands with multiple locations to manage their social profiles for tens to thousands of locations - all from one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Sendible?
why_choose_tab_title_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_heading: What do users love about Synup Social?
testimonial_summary: Synup Social takes the pressure out of social media management - so you can focus on engaging with your audience. Our customers love that Synup Social functions as a judicious team member, doing everything from expediting approval workflows and advanced analytics to revolutionary post ideas and optimization. Plus, Synup Social’s collaboration workflow empowers you to spend less time creating and editing content!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Agorapulse and Synup Social are both renowned for their data-driven approach to social media management. While both Agorapulse and Synup Social provide valuable features for managing social media accounts, Synup Social takes the cake with superior analytics, AI-powered post generation, affordable pricing, collaborative abilities, and user-friendliness. Synup Social is perfect for small businesses, agencies, and enterprises alike!

seo.title: Agorapulse Alternatives - Compare Features & Pricing
seo.description: Explore the best Agorapulse alternatives for your social media management needs. Compare features, pricing, and user reviews of top social media tools on Synup. Find the perfect Agorapulse alternative to help you manage your social media accounts efficiently and effectively.
